old_claim.note: Logarithms & Early Calculus is an earlier historical predecessor or foundation, not a one-to-one engineering dependency.

new_claim_absent: Relativity already retains mathematics and Maxwellian electrodynamics; the primary paper does not support a separate Cavalieri edge.

source_shape.source_locator: Einstein's 1905 paper develops special relativity from electrodynamics, kinematics, and mathematical reasoning without citing Cavalieri's 1635 method.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The primary work supports electromagnetism and mathematics but does not justify a direct edge from one specific precalculus geometry.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The corrected scope leaves this relationship outside the causal boundary. Relativity already retains mathematics and Maxwellian electrodynamics; the primary paper does not support a separate Cavalieri edge.

ontology_after: Relativity already retains mathematics and Maxwellian electrodynamics; the primary paper does not support a separate Cavalieri edge.
